title: Estimate NW and job per person

log.context: Estimate NW and job per person

- **centronias**: FIRE'd/retired tech, $3.5-4.5M NW (self-reported $3.6M after mortgage, farm property, voluntarily unemployed)
- **koole__ (Dylan)**: Sr. SWE at Crusoe Energy, $400K-900K NW (SF renter...(truncated)
